evidence: "This film was made before its time. Today's sifi audience loves it."
"This series featuring regenerating Doctors has been around off and on for 50 years. It is lighthearted, adventurous, funny and strange."
"I hate a film that has a story so thin that I basically see the movie by watching the trailer."
"Had to watch until the end since it was complex and I wanted to see how it all worked out."
"The film is paced slowly due to the nature of the reality of space travel..."
"It is a colorful and loud and fast-moving story that calls for popcorn and good speakers..."
"The sound is excellent given the recording technology of the 1970's when the film was released."
"Good film to watch twice. First time you learn the general story, the second time you see more details."
"If you like The Hobbit films, you owe it to yourself to get the Extended Edition."
"Keep your subwoofer on because there are lots of effects that use it."
"Watch Doctor Who a day after it airs in London."
"Discusses real human issues and problems. (But cleverly disguised as talking animal issues)"
"It is a colorful and loud and fast-moving story that calls for popcorn and good speakers..."

summary: The user enjoys a mix of sci-fi, comedy, and adventure genres, with a preference for films that offer both quality production and emotional depth. They appreciate complex narratives but also enjoy fast-paced, entertaining experiences, indicating a diverse taste in movies and TV shows.
